first-steps: Complete at least one lesson in any course
course-completer: Complete all lessons in a course and receive your credential
speed-runner: Enroll and complete all lessons in a single course within 24 hours
week-warrior: Complete at least one activity per day for 7 consecutive days
monthly-master: Complete at least one activity per day for 30 consecutive days
consistency-king: Complete at least one activity per day for 100 consecutive days
rust-rookie: Complete any course tagged with Rust
anchor-expert: Complete every course tagged with Anchor
early-adopter: Claim this achievement before the supply runs out (limited edition)
bug-hunter: Report a bug that gets verified by the team (admin-awarded)
social-butterfly: Link your Google, GitHub, and Solana wallet accounts
